name: Node.js
description: Node.js (LTS by default) via mise, with a configurable package manager (pnpm by default; npm or yarn supported). Package managers other than npm are activated through corepack.

version.description: Node version. 'lts' or 'latest' resolves through mise; otherwise a major (`22`) or full version (`22.11.0`).

packageManager.description: Package manager activated by default. 'npm' ships with Node; 'pnpm' and 'yarn' are activated through corepack. Use 'none' to leave package.json's `packageManager` field in charge.

packageManagerVersion.description: Version pinned via corepack for pnpm/yarn. Use 'latest' to skip pinning. Ignored when packageManager is 'npm' or 'none'.
